name: Fettuccini and Lobster Alla Pantelleria
recipeIngredient: 2 lobsters, each weighing 1 1/2 pounds, steamed and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil and add 2 tablespoons of salt.
2. Crack the lobster shells and remove the meat. Cut the tail into 1/2-inch slices and the claws into 3 pieces. Set aside the tomalley.
3. In a blender, mix mint, basil, parsley, garlic, capers, tomatoes, freshly ground black pepper, and extra virgin olive oil to form a smooth paste. If needed, add a little more olive oil.
4. Pour the pesto mixture and lobster into a large serving bowl.
5. Cook fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente, then drain well.
6. Pour hot pasta into the bowl with lobster and toss gently until well mixed.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
